overall.description: A first-person flight through a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis at night, navigating between illuminated skyscrapers and neon-lit corridors in a flying vehicle. The journey passes towering glass buildings, holographic advertisements including giant floating koi fish, and dense urban architecture before exiting to a waterfront area.

events.description: begins banking left toward the cluster of illuminated skyscrapers
building with '06' marker becomes clearly visible on the central skyscraper

agents.ego_description: piloting a flying vehicle through the upper levels of the city, approaching the illuminated skyscrapers from an elevated position

entered.detail: dark metallic frame of the flying vehicle cockpit with visible HUD elements
tall glass skyscraper with illuminated '06' marker on the facade
modern high-rise building with grid-patterned illuminated windows
curved elevated roadway with vehicle lights visible below

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person cockpit view flying over a sprawling cyberpunk city at night. The camera approaches a cluster of illuminated skyscrapers including one marked with '06', banking left to align with the downtown core. The vehicle maintains high altitude with full sky visibility above the neon-lit urban landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow aerial corridor between high-rise buildings

events.description: sharp right turn to align with tight corridor between skyscrapers
passing extremely close to building facade with large '05' marker

agents.ego_description: navigating tight aerial corridors between skyscrapers, making sharp banking turns to avoid building facades

entered.detail: massive building with prominent white '05' signage and vertical illuminated windows
close building facade with illuminated windows passing by at high speed
tall building surface with grid-like window patterns on the right side

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a narrow aerial corridor between towering skyscrapers, transitioning from open sky to an enclosed urban canyon. The camera banks sharply around the building marked '05', with building facades passing by extremely close on both sides. The spatial layout becomes tight and constrained as the vehicle weaves through the dense architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense neon commercial district with holographic advertisements

events.description: giant holographic blue and orange koi fish appear swimming through the air between buildings
entering the densest part of the neon district with 'BROKEN' neon sign and vertical advertisements

agents.ego_description: flying through a dense neon-lit corridor surrounded by holographic advertisements, giant floating fish, and bright vertical signage

entered.detail: large translucent blue holographic fish swimming through the air between buildings
glowing orange holographic fish with flowing fins floating near the right building
vertical neon sign with green 'BROKEN' text on the left building facade
tall digital advertisement screen displaying product images
building with distinctive circular window patterns and yellow structural elements

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a visually dense commercial district filled with holographic advertisements. Giant glowing koi fish swim through the air between buildings while neon signs and digital billboards illuminate the corridor. The 'BROKEN' neon sign becomes visible on the left as the vehicle navigates through the most visually intense section of the city.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront exit leaving the downtown core

events.description: exiting the dense urban canyon into open air over dark water
slight descent as vehicle accelerates away from the city center toward distant structures

agents.ego_description: exiting the city center and flying over open water, leaving the neon-lit skyscrapers behind while approaching distant industrial towers

entered.detail: dark reflective water surface below with city lights reflecting faintly
large bridge with support pillars spanning across the water
distant tall industrial structures with red warning lights on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The vehicle breaks free from the dense urban environment, transitioning to open air over a dark waterfront. The neon lights of the city fade behind as the camera flies over calm water toward distant industrial towers. The lighting becomes significantly darker with fewer artificial light sources, creating a stark contrast to the previous neon-drenched corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person flight that transitions from a high-altitude overview of a cyberpunk metropolis into a claustrophobic neon corridor before emerging over a dark waterfront. It begins by banking left over a sprawling urban landscape of illuminated skyscrapers, including one marked with 06, under a wide open sky. As the vehicle descends, the scene shifts from open air into a tight aerial canyon, weaving sharply around a building marked 05 with facades passing closely on both sides. The environment then becomes visually saturated as the camera enters a commercial district filled with digital billboards, glowing neon signs like the one reading BROKEN, and giant holographic koi fish swimming through the air. Finally, the vehicle breaks free from the dense architecture, leaving the neon glow behind to glide over the calm, dark waters toward distant industrial towers.
